flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Casper College rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Casper College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $10.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Casper College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).
